name: Jones School Bus Svc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Jones School Bus' in Illinois. NLRB cases (13-RD-071687, 13-RC-021992) document Jones School Bus Service / Jones School Bus Co. as having been operated by Durham School Services. The Belvidere address at 1111 McKinley Ave is currently occupied by First Student Inc per Yellow Pages/Manta listings, suggesting Jones School Bus was absorbed/replaced by Durham/First Student. Closest SAFER hit 'B Jones Bus Service' (USDOT 1941966) is in Maryville TN (3 units), NOT a match. Could not locate IL SoS entity record online for 'Jones School Bus Service'.

name: American International Bus LLC
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record located for 'American International Bus LLC' in Arizona/Scottsdale. SAFER keyword search for AMERICAN INTERNATIONAL returns only USDOT 2696562 in Camarillo CA (not a match). The provided address '7620 E McKellips Rd # 4 PMB 60, Scottsdale, AZ 85257' corresponds to a UPS Authorized Shipping Outlet / Mail Box Shop, indicating this is a mailbox/PMB drop rather than an operating yard. Likely a shell/inactive or small mailbox-registered entity; no corporate filing details surfaced.

name: F M Kuzmeskus Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Auth. For Hire and Priv. Pass. (Business); Authorized for Passenger
fmcsa_address: 52 Main Road, Gill, MA 01354 (mailing: 3700 Embassy Pkwy Ste 500, Akron, OH 44333 - Beacon Mobility HQ)
officers: Historically Kuzmeskus family (Jacob Kuzmeskus founded operations 1926); acquired by Van Pool Transportation LLC / Beacon Mobility in 2022
entity_status: Active (MA corporation; now subsidiary of Beacon Mobility)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth (per Buzzfile/BBB), Federal Register STB Notice 2022-15046
notes: DBA Travel Kuz. Input address '77 Ferry St, Easthampton, MA' differs from FMCSA physical '52 Main Road, Gill, MA' — Easthampton may be a satellite location/yard; Gill is the long-standing HQ. Operations began 1926 (Jacob Kuzmeskus); incorporated 8/1/1973. Acquired by Beacon Mobility (via Van Pool Transportation LLC) in 2022, announced Sept 2022. 141 power units / 124 drivers per SAFER. Satisfactory safety rating (05/29/2025).

name: Miles Away Charter LLC
carrier_operation: Interstate; Auth. For Hire; Authorized for Passenger
inc_date: 2004 (founded; exact DC LLC organization date not confirmed via DLCP CorpOnline online search)
entity_status: Active (DC LLC; DBE certified by USDOT)
registry_source: DC DLCP Corporations Division (CorpOnline); USDOT DBE registry
notes: FMCSA snapshot returned via MC# 490435 lookup. Despite input state listing 'MD', registered/operating from Washington DC (316 F St NE). 25 power units, 18 drivers. Satisfactory safety rating (07/03/2024). DBE-certified per DOT. Founded 2004 per Kona Equity / industry profiles; exact DC formation date not pulled from DLCP in this run.

name: Koch School Bus Svc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Priv. Pass. (Business); not authorized for for-hire interstate
officers: Brian Koch (CEO/Owner); Curtis Koch; Judy Koch; Samuel Koch (General Manager); Shane Johnson (COO); Chris Champlin (CFO). Founded by Victor Koch (1938).
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State Business Filings
notes: Exact match on name, address (150 Victor Ct, Waconia MN), and USDOT. 148 power units, 150 drivers per SAFER. Family-owned third-generation operation; founded 1938 by Victor Koch, formally registered with MN SoS ~6/1/1974. ~7,000 students/day across 94 routes per company website. Intrastate-only operator.
